title: Patient-facing educational glossary (oncologist + advocate reviewed)
context: This is patient-facing educational content and is HIGH RISK. It is a hard gate: released only with BOTH oncologist AND patient-advocate sign-off; without the panel the item is deferred, not shipped. Education only - no diagnostic, prognostic, or treatment guidance, and every entry carries a prominent "not medical advice" notice routing readers to their care team.
objective: Produce a patient-facing educational glossary, released only with both oncologist and patient-advocate sign-off, otherwise explicitly deferred.
acceptanceCriteria: Hard gate: released only with both oncologist and patient-advocate sign-off; without the panel, the item is deferred, not shipped.
Every entry carries a prominent "not medical advice" notice and routes readers to their care team; education only - no diagnostic/prognostic/treatment guidance.
Every assertion sourced (provenance 100%); plain language verified with an advocate.
